name: opentrace
description: Knowledge graph tools for exploring system architecture, code structure, and service dependencies.

interface.shortDescription: Knowledge graph for system architecture and code structure.
interface.longDescription: OpenTrace indexes your codebase into a queryable knowledge graph — classes, functions, files, services, and their relationships — then exposes that graph through MCP so Codex can answer questions about system topology, dependencies, and impact without having to search and read files manually.
